title: MFA Token Lost — Executive Access Recovery

servicenow_seed.short_description: [TRAINING] VP reports lost MFA token — cannot access email or ERP
servicenow_seed.description: A VP-level executive reports their hardware RSA token was lost or stolen and they cannot authenticate to their email or ERP system. They are traveling and have a board meeting in 2 hours. Identity of caller unconfirmed.

correct_steps: Do NOT bypass MFA — under no circumstance should authentication be circumvented
Verify caller identity via out-of-band callback to HR-listed mobile or video call with manager
Set urgency to 1 (Critical) given executive role and business impact
Document verification steps and outcome in work notes
Escalate to Identity and Access Management (IAM) team for emergency token replacement
If verification fails, do not proceed — log suspicious access attempt
rationale: Lost MFA tokens for privileged accounts require IAM involvement. Tier 2 must verify identity before any action. Urgency 1 is appropriate given business impact. Bypassing MFA is a security violation.
